endpoints.title: Bioelectric Systems™ Map
endpoints.description: Machine-readable paid system map for Bioelectric Systems™, including bioelectricity, morphogenesis, regeneration, plant electrophysiology, soil electrical networks, electrical ecology, and living signal architecture.

endpoints.title: Quantum Agriculture™ Map
endpoints.description: Machine-readable paid system map for Quantum Agriculture™, including living soil intelligence, bioelectric farming, structured water, photons, mycorrhizal partnerships, regenerative systems, carbon farming, and future food systems.

endpoints.title: Plant Intelligence™ Map
endpoints.description: Machine-readable paid system map for Plant Intelligence™, including plant communication, electrophysiology, root intelligence, plant memory, sensory biology, defense systems, cooperation, mycorrhizal networks, and adaptive plant behavior.

notes: Use these three routes for Phase 2A x402 expansion.
Add each route to routeAliases, paidResources, and the paidPayload switch block in the Cloudflare Worker.
Do not use paidResource.description directly inside payload blocks. Use paidResource?.description ||
After deployment, verify state-token counts update to x402_payload_routes = 23 and total_machine_routes = 49.
